name: explore_bn320_cap15
hypothesis: Stack two best single improvements: bn320 (-0.64%) + logit_cap15 (-0.54%). Key question: do they compound or interfere like previous combos?

name: explore_logit_cap10
hypothesis: Tighter softcap than 15. If 30→15 was -0.54%, maybe 10 is even better. Finding the optimum.

name: explore_logit_cap20
hypothesis: Bracket softcap from the other side. 20 is between baseline (30) and winner (15).

name: explore_logit_cap8
hypothesis: Very tight softcap. Does it still work or does it constrain too much?

name: explore_logit_cap12
hypothesis: Fine-grain bracket between 10 and 15 to find the peak.

name: explore_bn320_cap15_vr
hypothesis: Triple stack: all three independent wins. Will three changes compound at 500 steps?

name: explore_resid_scale_01
hypothesis: LayerScale (0.1 init). Completely unexplored axis — could be a new independent win.

name: explore_act_power_30
hypothesis: Cubing activation instead of squaring. Squaring is proven key — is higher power better?
